mapper.select: SELECT openid, unionid, nickname, avatar_url, create_time, update_time FROM wx_ma_user WHERE openid = #{openid} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO wx_ma_user (openid, unionid, nickname, avatar_url) VALUES (#{u.openid}, #{u.unionid}, #{u.nickname}, #{u.avatarUrl}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE unionid = COALESCE(VALUES(unionid), unionid), nickname = COALESCE(VALUES(nickname), nickname), avatar_url = COALESCE(VALUES(avatar_url), avatar_url), update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
